violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep table found with food temperatures up to 46F and ambient temperature in bottom found at 45.6F.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. *No chlorine test strips available, facility uses chlorine for sanitizer solutions.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Personal items/keys stored on lid of baking powder at dry storage area.
